## Meeting Purpose

[Review sales pipeline prioritization and discuss ICP criteria refinement for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to establish clearer ICP criteria for prioritizing deals, balancing quantitative metrics with qualitative factors](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Focus on signing Series B to Series E companies, with potential for upsells and long-term partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Maintain current pricing structure ($30K + $15K) to protect Net Revenue Retention (NRR) through future upsells](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [George to create formal ICP refinement project plan and share with team next week](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

## Topics

### Pipeline Prioritization Challenges

  - [Tyler struggling to manage multiple potential deals for October start dates](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Seeking guidance on prioritizing companies like Redis, Field Guide, Viscom, and Norm](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Need for clearer criteria to confidently prioritize or deprioritize prospects](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### ICP Refinement Process

  - [George working on formal ICP matrix, to be shared next week](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Team discussed need for project management approach to ICP refinement:](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
      - [Create Slack channel for "Project FindICP"](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
      - [Set up recurring meetings with key stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
      - [Determine extent of Daniel's involvement](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)

### Quantitative vs. Qualitative ICP Criteria

  - [Current focus on Series B+ companies](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Discussed potential metrics like domain authority (40+) and number of pages](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [George emphasized importance of qualitative factors:](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [Existing blog structure and organization](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
      - [Client openness to GrowthX strategy and leadership](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
      - [Goals for content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Decision-making structure within client organization](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)

### Client Case Studies

1.  Field Guide:
    
      - [Series B, $30M funding](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
      - [Limited existing content, but open to GrowthX leadership](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
      - [Potential for long-term partnership](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)

2.  GetExcept:
    
      - [Series B, more established content presence](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
      - [Concerns about time zone challenges and competitive space](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
      - [Asking detailed ROI questions, potentially more difficult to work with](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)

3.  Unnamed camera software company:
    
      - [Founded in 1995, but with modern software offerings](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [Strong understanding of GrowthX services](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
      - [Good access to CMO and team](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
      - [Ready to sign, but Tyler hesitant due to company age and type](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)

### Pricing and Work Stream Structure

  - [Maintain current pricing: $30K + $15K per work stream](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [Focus on starting with editorial work stream for most clients](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [Potential for programmatic upsells later in engagement (e.g., 4+ months)](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Discussed challenges of maintaining programmatic upsells long-term](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)

## Next Steps

  - [George to create and share formal ICP refinement project plan next week](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Tyler to organize pipeline in HubSpot with high/medium/low priorities](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)
  - [George to review pipeline priorities with Marcel, focusing on high and medium priority deals](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Team to reassess Norm's priority status with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Tyler to adjust client communications to focus on editorial work stream initially, setting expectations for potential future upsells](https://fathom.video/share/onA7wsy852HAGM5XzQFK9vLWq5o6A1fz?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
